## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Samantha Olinger for the Engagement Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Fit:** Samantha Olinger's experience as a Senior CSM at BrightEdge, managing a pod structure and using Gainsight, aligns directly with GrowthX's agency model and toolset.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**GrowthX Model:** GrowthX is a Series A agency using an internal AI platform to generate content. The services business provides runway to build a future SaaS product without launch pressure.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [**Role Focus:** The Engagement Manager owns client relationships and renewals, managing a book of \~8 clients (scaling to 12 by Q2 2025). The role is strategic, not hands-on content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Key KPI Shift:** GrowthX is moving beyond traditional SEO metrics (traffic) to focus on "AI visibility"—driving mentions and inclusions in LLM answers to capture new referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX: Agency & Product Strategy

  - [**Business Model:** A hybrid agency (1+ year old) building an internal AI platform for content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** The services business provides financial runway, de-risking the product launch and enabling engineering to innovate without immediate revenue pressure.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [**Future Vision:** The internal AI platform may become an external SaaS product, creating a dual services/product business.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### Engagement Manager Role & Structure

  - [**Team Structure:** A traditional "pod" model:](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers (EMs):** Own client relationships, strategy, and renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Managing Editors (MEs):** Own end-to-end content production using the AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Director-Level Specialists:** Provide quarterly strategic support (e.g., QBRs).](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
  - [**EM Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Relationship management and client communication (Slack).](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Performance tracking against goals.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Project management (no hands-on content editing).](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:** Renewals, contract expansion, and defining new workstreams.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

### Candidate Experience: Samantha Olinger

  - [**Background:** Senior Customer Success Manager at BrightEdge, with prior experience at a small agency.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**AI Adoption Strategy:** Focuses on discovery to tailor workflows to a client's comfort level, using a "train, demo, feedback" loop to build muscle memory.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Cross-Functional Coordination:** Acts as the single point of contact for clients, managing internal teams (Eng, Product) to provide a seamless experience.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [**Project Management:** Prioritizes accounts weekly based on health signals (churn risk, renewal status) to proactively manage the team's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [**Tooling:** Proficient with Asana, Monday, Salesforce, and Gainsight.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
      - [**Gainsight Feedback:** Valuable for tracking user adoption and identifying struggles, but noted for integration issues.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

### Example: Recovering an Off-Track Project

  - [**Scenario:** A client derailed a 2025 SEO strategy (pillar pages → segment pages) to pursue a new AI content project.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Recovery:** Olinger refocused the client by tying the new AI project back to the original strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This maintained workflow consistency, prevented progress loss, and ensured measurable results for end-of-year reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

### Example: Managing Executive Stakeholders

  - [**Scenario:** A CEO signed a deal but is not involved in day-to-day work.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Keep the CEO engaged via email on all follow-ups, recordings, and strategic updates.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This maintains executive buy-in and reinforces the day-to-day contact's authority by referencing the CEO's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Follow up with Samantha Olinger regarding next steps in the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/nYVxJEBwgs31kWmn6pcyzSsv7RFTsWYW?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
